filter_summary.taxonomy_key_rule: pytest collection routes through tests/__main__.py; taxonomy key format is __main__::Class.test

candidate_visibility: Candidate generation may receive only spec.md plus generic implementation instructions. Do not expose source path, tests, kept_nodeids, taxonomy, reference_score, reviews, or prior outputs.
scoring_entry: Use kept_nodeids_direct.txt with taxonomy_direct.jsonl for candidate scoring. The original kept_nodeids.txt records the upstream aggregate collection nodeids from Step 4/5, but tests/__main__.py imports unrelated test modules before selecting kept nodeids and can cause false collection pollution.
skip_policy: Candidate scoring must run the same kept nodeids in the same dependency profile as reference validation. Skips are accepted only when produced by the same upstream skip logic, optional-dependency availability, parser-mode support checks, or explicit slow-test markers observed during reference validation.
next_step: No benchmark repair required; task is qualified.

scorer_isolation.source_shadowing_guard: Remove the source package path from the copied oracle worktree before scoring, then require preflight stdout to point into candidate output.
scorer_isolation.verification_status: recommended_not_historically_recorded; rerun scoring before using as a final candidate score

coverage-gap.requires_action: No Gate D action required under current-main audit.
